body:
For those of you who already voted, thank you.

| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791e/27c6da69/2b3d1df7/12f1776/2266437724/VEsH/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-header-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")

Election Day is finally here!

For those of you who already voted,**thank you.**

If you haven't, find your polling place _**[here](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791e/27c6da69/2b3d1df7/12f1778/2266437724/VEsF/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://www2.sdcounty.ca.gov/rov/Eng/polling.asp")**_. You still have a few hours left until polls close at 8 p.m. If you're in line at 8p.m., stay in line. You can still vote!

We're also doing an Election Day fundraising drive to help us across the finish line. [_**Please chip in here to help out.**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791e/27c6da69/2b3d1df7/12f1777/2266437724/VEsC/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200303-2-EM&amount=1")

Thanks for all that you do!

Amy

* * *
| | [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791e/27c6da69/2b3d1df7/12f1779/2266437724/VEsD/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-button&recurring=true&amount=25")

---

Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs is running for Congress in California's 53rd Congressional District. In Congress, she will fight for policies to address climate change, guarantee health care as a human right, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, and defend access to reproductive care. Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! _[You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b791e/27c6da69/2b3d1df7/12f177a/2266437724/VEsA/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")_

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902dd/7f51f7bc/4da8aa24/4ef19fcf/2484235651/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

I'm not a career politician, and running for Senate was never my plan. I'm just one of the millions of Texans who have seen the world we're giving our children and thought **"hell no."**

That's why what we've come together to build is so impressive, and I am so proud. Together, we've built this campaign from the ground up and proven we have what it takes to do something incredible in November: WIN Texas. That starts tonight.

**With results from the primary still rolling in, we 're confident that we're in a strong position and are advancing to the runoff stage.**

This primary was the first major test of our powerful grassroots campaign, and we passed with flying colors. Now, we're ready to hit the ground running in the runoff election and emerge in a strong position to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November.

Our momentum in this race is unparalleled. We've met thousands of Texans as we've traveled tens of thousands of miles across our great state, earned endorsements from many editorial boards and organizations, and raised over $4 million from 35,000 donors.

There's no doubt this runoff will be hard-fought, but I've taken on tough fights my whole life. Like when I was shot down and fought back against the Taliban, when I took on the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women, and when I fought for my life during childbirth. Together, we WILL win this one.

We have to. If we want to take action on climate change, expand and improve health care, defend reproductive rights, end the gun violence epidemic, pass immigration reform, and more -- we must win this seat.

Our focus is the ultimate goal: defeating an 18-year senator who's sold out Texans' health, safety, and security to special interests, political bosses, and corporate donors. Ours is the only campaign that has what it takes, and this runoff is our opportunity to prove it.

So let's celebrate tonight, and get right back to work tomorrow -- because we've got to send a message to Sen. Cornyn: the people of Texas are coming to take back our Senate seat.

Thanks for joining me in this fight.

\-- MJ Hegar

****[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902dd/7f51f7bc/4da8aa24/4ef19fce/2484235651/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200303fl__1009__&amount=10&recurring=true")****
---

name: Christy Smith
subject: Result are coming in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b845/29776869/ace91cc/569f98ca/2554651964/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | Peter,

They are still counting votes, but I am proud to say that we are heading to the runoff. WOW!

I am extremely grateful for the support our campaign has received from every corner of this district, supporting our vision focused on serving others and fighting fiercely for families. We have sent a loud and clear message with our decisive first-place finish.

While we don't know which Republican will advance, voters will make a choice in May between two contrasting visions. The two Republican candidates are essentially promising to be a blank check for Donald Trump.

Both my record of public service and our campaign are about moving past the Washington status quo and focusing on kitchen table issues like lowering prescription drug costs, making health care more affordable, strengthening our public schools, and breaking the stranglehold special interests have on our politics.

I will continue to work with anyone from either party willing to deliver on those priorities for this district, and stand up to anyone who puts my community in harm's way.

Presenting that contrast to voters starts right now, Peter.

clean_body: | "" | | Peter, They are still counting votes, but I am proud to say that we are heading to the runoff. WOW! I am extremely grateful for the support our campaign has received from every corner of this district, supporting our vision focused on serving others and fighting fiercely for families. We have sent a loud and clear message with our decisive first-place finish. While we don't know which Republican will advance, voters will make a choice in May between two contrasting visions. The two Republican candidates are essentially promising to be a blank check for Donald Trump. Both my record of public service and our campaign are about moving past the Washington status quo and focusing on kitchen table issues like lowering prescription drug costs, making health care more affordable, strengthening our public schools, and breaking the stranglehold special interests have on our politics. I will continue to work with anyone from either party willing to deliver on those priorities for this district, and stand up to anyone who puts my community in harm's way. Presenting that contrast to voters starts right now, Peter. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" "" | "" Thank you for all you've done so far. name: Team Hagerty
subject: Join Team Hagerty in Praying for Tennessee Tornado Victims
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-jl/)
# March 3, 2020
**#TeamHagerty Stands With Those Affected By Tornadoes** Last night's tornadoes in Tennessee were devastating. Team Hagerty is praying for all Tennesseans affected by this disaster. We will continue to monitor the aftermath of this storm and will provide updates and information as it becomes available. We are thankful to President Trump for acting swiftly to work with Governor Bill Lee and local leaders to provide relief. The President will be in Tennesse on Friday to survey the devastated areas.Tennesseans are resilient. We are strong and will come out of this stronger than ever before. Now is the time to reach out a hand to help friends and neighbors in need. To find out how you can help and to get information about resources in affected areas, visit our website [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-r/)
## **In Case You Missed It...**
Bill Hagerty released the first in a series of policy plans on Friday. **[" Bill's Blueprint To Support Our Farmers"](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-y/)** outlines his commitment to support the 77,000 farmers in Tennessee. Bill learned the value of hard work at a young age while raising pigs and cattle and serving as the FFA president to his chapter. He understands the challenges that Tennessee farmers and agriculture workers face and will fight for them when he gets to the Senate. Be on the lookout as Bill releases more of his Blueprints to success for Tennesseans.
## **Don't Miss Super Tuesday!**
#TeamHagerty supports President Donald Trump because he is fighting for the American people and will protect the conservative values held by Tennesseans across the state. Today is your last chance to get out to the polls and cast your ballot for President Trump in the Presidential Preference Primary!
## **#TeamHagerty In The News**
[**Mayor Rick Graham:** Bloomberg's comments on farmers insulting](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-j/)
Our farmers must be well represented in Washington so that their products can be well represented across the globe. Bill Hagerty is running for the U.S. Senate this year and already has a proven track record of working with President Donald Trump to support our farmers, when he served as our Ambassador to Japan. I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee's next Senator.[**Steve Osborn:** Bill Hagerty's Record Edges Dr. Manny Sethi's Pledges](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-t/)
Since my meeting with the Bill, I spoke with conservative legislators in Nashville, who confirmed that Bill Hagerty is a man of faith, a conservative, and he has worked diligently for the betterment of the state. Taking everything into consideration, it is my conclusion that Bill Hagerty is the better candidate and will serve the nation and the state of Tennessee well, should he become our next U.S. Senator.[**Jeff Broyles: **Hagerty fights for conservatives](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-i/)
Bill's broad range of experience both in business and government make him the best qualified for the job, period. He is a family man who not only displays the Christian conservative values we expect by those representing us but truly lives them in daily life. He genuinely cares about Tennesseans and is fully equipped to go to battle in Washington in our defense. After looking him in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president's agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well.
## **Be a Part of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-d/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-h/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-k/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Lebanon Democrat:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-m/) **GOP U.S. Senate hopeful Hagerty stresses Trump ties**[The Chattanoogan:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-c/)**[** **](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-q/) Hagerty Hits "Mini Mike" In Speech to Chattanooga Pachyderm Club**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-a/)** Exclusive- Trump Reinforcement On The Way From Tennessee: Bill Hagerty's Senate Race Highlights President's Takeover Of GOP**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-f/) **Nikki Haley Says Bill Hagerty Is 'A Quality Republican' During Nashville Stop
## **What They're Saying...**
> _" Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."_
> [-Michael Tedder](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" That's why it's very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats' extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."_
> [-Kenneth Eaton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."_
> [-Charlotte Kelley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-s/) _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-g/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-w/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-yd/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-yh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-yk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-yu/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[ Like ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-fb-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-jr/)
[ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-tw-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-jy/)
[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-nddbo-l-jj)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-nddbo-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-jt) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-nddbo-fuutjhhtj-ji/)

clean_body: Peter, Wow, we are in the lead! This campaign continues to show how Democrats win in Texas: with people power! In 2018, we shocked many observers when we held ultra-wealthy GOP incumbent Michael McCaul to 51% of the vote and turned the Texas 10th into a battleground district. And last night we did the same: facing two well-funded opponents and an outside “super PAC” who, together, spent over $2.5 million, we are in first place with a substantial lead. Our work is just beginning. We are now locked in a competitive runoff against a well-funded opponent with lots of money behind him. We need to do everything we can to match those resources. = = This campaign is the only one that can beat the wealth and gerrymandered advantage of Rep. McCaul. We will keep working in the district, knocking doors, and building an unstoppable coalition to demand real political change here in TX-10. Michael McCaul has nearly unlimited resources at his disposal, but our campaign has shown that people power overpowers big spending. = = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Onward
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiHck-GtIFYV9BL-GJU4w7bQgI6-nAw_YvO49hELzlI=/yYC4NaJT-cWgXGThUQ-GzUSsIcfd2h1KB2Kry2FpSY8=)
---
| **Folks -- Thank you.** **It has been the honor of my lifetime to serve you in Congress, and I am grateful for the opportunity to continue to bring your voice to the table in 2020 and beyond.** As long as I serve as your Representative in Washington, I will continue to fight for affordable healthcare, voting and civil rights, fair housing, compassionate immigration policy, the protection of our air, water, and climate, and justice in all forms. I know that we can heal from the abuses of the Trump administration and build a fairer and more prosperous nation -- and I won't stop fighting until that vision is a reality. So, thank you, thank you, thank you for standing with me in this fight. United, we can and will be victorious. In service, Congressman Al Green **P.S.[Our fight is far from over. President Trump and National Republicans show no signs of slowing down their efforts to defeat our movement in the general election, and we have to be ready for whatever they throw our way -- you can help fight back by becoming a Founding Donor to our General Election Fund.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiHck-GtIFYV9BL-GJU4w7bQgI6-nAw_YvO49hELzlI=/Yq3vGEfegQZ-4JawZzy71zObd-GGoTckgSJkpfJwR50=?refcode=E1633-20200304-PrimaryWin-SL&amount=25)** | **[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/QiHck-GtIFYV9BL-GJU4w7bQgI6-nAw_YvO49hELzlI=/Yq3vGEfegQZ-4JawZzy71zObd-GGoTckgSJkpfJwR50=?refcode=E1633-20200304-PrimaryWin-SB&amount=25)**
---

| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

name: Merideth VanSant
subject: Marching into March!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Merideth VanSant for Congress
body:
Our campaign has been on the road!
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZNiKbJ6_fVque6rBabl0AKyM_76QhtJ76-XEEVdXrT642MYstBWHVIRELLZtJGaWd0mrzG5THc9dgEB5kw0EfsgV6Pu8SYHyWqkwCrlGiE_KMRBZVT9IdxvD3Y-QFPPkwAgED4tFyyRDnlo0PpJECSjuwbbPvQM0&c=8AN8zjUCM3WVkP08qRe6bHt-ikvZGH_SPhkXxlTWLk4XwfxlZVIZbg==&ch=vHzSZe0WxZT2eL59B-b9vERO-Taq7_w4JV3dj8qg_NXefU9YclAT6Q==)
---
| |
---
| Hello!

February was quite a month! We had several meet and greet events, including a joint event with Senator James Lankford, a discussion around issues impacting active military and veterans with the Oklahoma Veteran Families Alliance board, and chatted with neighbors over coffee at our local Kiwanis groups, prayer groups, trade groups, HOAs, and conservative grassroots advocacy organizations.
We've also been hosting Team VanSant Town Halls across the District where I've been speaking about the national gridlock that is stalling Oklahoma growth and my plan to make our government work for us again. You can watch a brief clip of our Del City Town Hall below!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZNiKbJ6_fVque6rBabl0AKyM_76QhtJ76-XEEVdXrT642MYstBWHVIrghXMLS2Z88P5NhJIUkbwQSU_hPzXwc-7xC9emGBISaFGAx9WJjp32rOO5-Wm-vZiGpcYm2mxx39eYdFhRiho28Guyoh-KQw==&c=8AN8zjUCM3WVkP08qRe6bHt-ikvZGH_SPhkXxlTWLk4XwfxlZVIZbg==&ch=vHzSZe0WxZT2eL59B-b9vERO-Taq7_w4JV3dj8qg_NXefU9YclAT6Q==)
---
| During the month I was able to make a quick day trip to New York and stopped by the New York Stock Exchange. My visit got me thinking about the role of the free market in protecting our prosperity and [I shared my thoughts in an op-ed.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZNiKbJ6_fVque6rBabl0AKyM_76QhtJ76-XEEVdXrT642MYstBWHVNwAnk2NhknyQjH1zxul-Pf3TozBQ57eBX1fZII45kRDKvGLUAF3mr795rQZm1iTxS8NOZ5EWM52KDitbrnXJ_EWZe-prBsAk4pexSlP5RTjywB7gfYPaVJUnrJOZPkiw5bqd3QLai_B2Us8c_fWDl3bJNWhLWsBTNXps9_ZFHX3xve6QWAgemE=&c=8AN8zjUCM3WVkP08qRe6bHt-ikvZGH_SPhkXxlTWLk4XwfxlZVIZbg==&ch=vHzSZe0WxZT2eL59B-b9vERO-Taq7_w4JV3dj8qg_NXefU9YclAT6Q==)
I will continue to prioritize listening to our community's concerns and needs so that I can best fight for them in Washington. That's why I'm in our District listening, learning, and fighting to make our national government work for us again, and why so many of our local companies and community members are backing our pro-business, pro-family work.
I would love for you to join our work by [registering as a volunteer here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZNiKbJ6_fVque6rBabl0AKyM_76QhtJ76-XEEVdXrT642MYstBWHVC-rotv5ehdkbLOoPMo1ZqwCiy20PMSUSZbXpEBp2Oy6ErnKCfZSrBZxwiifPSUmeSxkXvnhgnWWQvEsTQQERHz9-Q8eF2OmuluKSrSkKmH0jQLomxxZG04=&c=8AN8zjUCM3WVkP08qRe6bHt-ikvZGH_SPhkXxlTWLk4XwfxlZVIZbg==&ch=vHzSZe0WxZT2eL59B-b9vERO-Taq7_w4JV3dj8qg_NXefU9YclAT6Q==) or [requesting a yard sign and/or road sign here. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZNiKbJ6_fVque6rBabl0AKyM_76QhtJ76-XEEVdXrT642MYstBWHVLBibVGSQMadA4Yd4ofRHaVrt_v6mmpXvloa1ayni93uNXcs5PLtGiH--6QpU7B1062OUsOF3iAoyX-ZMaBBdH-9ByH0VzXw2JzMpO2oDPzR57i11aFTDcqfEEhW_-OwLg==&c=8AN8zjUCM3WVkP08qRe6bHt-ikvZGH_SPhkXxlTWLk4XwfxlZVIZbg==&ch=vHzSZe0WxZT2eL59B-b9vERO-Taq7_w4JV3dj8qg_NXefU9YclAT6Q==)
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Merideth VanSant
---
| | |
---
| ABOUT MERIDETH
---
|
---
| Merideth VanSant grew up here in Oklahoma City working at the family hardware store and lumberyard, where she learned the conservative values of hard work and community. A product of our Oklahoma public schools, Merideth was an award-winning business management consultant before starting her own successful business. A featured keynote speaker on business issues, former U.S. Delegate at the Global Entrepreneurship Summit, and co-founder of a social enterprising company that serves inner-city youth, Merideth has the commitment to community and business experience we need in Washington D.C.
She is 100% pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, pro-border security, and supports President Trump as our duly elected Commander in Chief.
---
| |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZNiKbJ6_fVque6rBabl0AKyM_76QhtJ76-XEEVdXrT642MYstBWHVC-rotv5ehdkVnTq2f6rQZAmxnbfqtUS3urLWE3yVTc3t-Y9ijIEcK8KQnADR0frPCF1X8m6izVBUzOHV_6oupWELcPIaX2_40Bgvsb8HeDWbaEYpJHG4DQ=&c=8AN8zjUCM3WVkP08qRe6bHt-ikvZGH_SPhkXxlTWLk4XwfxlZVIZbg==&ch=vHzSZe0WxZT2eL59B-b9vERO-Taq7_w4JV3dj8qg_NXefU9YclAT6Q==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZNiKbJ6_fVque6rBabl0AKyM_76QhtJ76-XEEVdXrT642MYstBWHVC-rotv5ehdk3EIfFKTrW_M_1Q1EqYox7X9z9GPz8zWDvY1E2CsFRbuFAh8B8hAPP50Qfpew-psJuPQk59H1f60EL1zsGVbvoJ9obBgTx8V6&c=8AN8zjUCM3WVkP08qRe6bHt-ikvZGH_SPhkXxlTWLk4XwfxlZVIZbg==&ch=vHzSZe0WxZT2eL59B-b9vERO-Taq7_w4JV3dj8qg_NXefU9YclAT6Q==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZNiKbJ6_fVque6rBabl0AKyM_76QhtJ76-XEEVdXrT642MYstBWHVC-rotv5ehdkbG-ojNYNgNLcXqwrPP-5zZCjsDHmD8xstO1nu1BbWPPcFTwaO0Vwy5wNujZ-Cz5zYLYxYxWncz9XIo_N38x9z2aeDDd5fCOZNKjeBMq3JSA=&c=8AN8zjUCM3WVkP08qRe6bHt-ikvZGH_SPhkXxlTWLk4XwfxlZVIZbg==&ch=vHzSZe0WxZT2eL59B-b9vERO-Taq7_w4JV3dj8qg_NXefU9YclAT6Q==)

name: Filemon Vela
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Filemon Vela for Congress |
body:
Friend – I can’t thank you enough for your support last night. It’s an honor to once again be your Democratic nominee in the 34th Congressional District.

Together, we’ve already accomplished so much for South Texas. We’ve secured critical investments in our infrastructure, strengthened opportunities for trade, created good jobs in our communities, and we’ve stood up to this administration’s abhorrent immigration policies.

We can’t let up now. Representing South Texas is the privilege of a lifetime and I know there’s more work ahead - that’s why I need your help.

Today marks the first day of the General Election and we need to be ready for anything. Click here to help us start strong by making a contribution to our General Election fund: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/filemon-vela-1?refcode=PTV_030420

Your support means we can continue to grow our organization and carry our momentum all the way through November.

Can we count you in?

Filemon

-----------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Filemon Vela for Congress |
-----------------------------------------------

Filemon Vela for Congress
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Sute 108 - 230
San Antonio TX 78248 United States

| | Dear Peter: As we race toward Election Day, I need your feet on the ground to help me cross the finish line as we hit the St. Patrick’s Day parade circuit and head toward a victory on March 17! Please consider joining Team Lipinski over the next two weekends as we celebrate the season and continue to spread our positive message to the working families of IL03. Your ongoing support is greatly appreciated, but please remember that we need to keep fighting each and every day through March 17 to defeat the extreme tax and spend policies of my opponent and keep commonsense leadership alive and well in our communities. Mark your calendar and come join the fun at one or more of these wonderful community celebrations: **Saturday, 3/7, Staging Time: Noon**
Countryside St Patrick's Day Parade
Staging Area: Countryside Park on 61st Street (between Brainard & Kensington)

Lemont St Patrick's Day Parade and Fest, Staging Time: 12:30 pm
Staging Area: Stephen Street & Safety Village Area

**Sunday, 3/9, Staging Time: Noon**
Tinley Park Irish Parade
Staging Area: Central Middle School 18146 S. Oak Park Ave Tinley Park

**Saturday, 3/14, Staging Time: Noon**
Archer Ave St Patrick's Day Parade
Staging Area: Oak Park and Archer

**Sunday 3/15, Staging Time: 12:30 pm** Southside Irish Parade
Staging Area: 99th and Western If you can’t attend a parade but would still like to request a sign or friend to friend cards, visit our website at [lipinskiforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15712471/166088888/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmU4MWU0ZC00NTVlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o3p50Ryr01ZKeyS4IcFMmQnOb3TOusbdNTTKWcRCH14=&emci=a8e230bd-415e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=c6e81e4d-455e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2478574). Dan

name: Jason Leviskas
subject: Oberweis for Congress: Weekend of Action Saturday March 7 & Sunday March 8 / Election Night information & New Radio Spot
body:
Greetings Friends and Supporters !

We have another "Weekend of Action" planned. Lots of doors to hit all over
the district. If you can make it out to *1 of our 5 walks* we have
organized, please let us know! If walking your own precinct is more your
speed, reply to this email with your precinct information and we can
provide a walk list and supplies to walk your neighborhood.
We also will have Sign Crews going all over the district putting up Large
and small signs. If you have a good location for us, please let us know by
replying to this email.

Latest News from Jim2020.com
JIM OBERWEIS NEW AD RESPONDS TO DEMOCRAT’S RADICAL IMMIGRATION POLICIES
OBERWEIS WARNED ABOUT CURRENT IMMIGRATION CRISIS
https://jim2020.com/jim-oberweis-new-ad-responds-to-democrats-radical-immigration-policies-oberweis-warned-about-current-immigration-crisis/

Attached is our newest Radio AD. Give it a listen and share on Social
Media👍

Vote by Mail Information
https://jim2020.com/vote-by-mail/

Saturday March 7th : 12:30 pm to 4pm.
Walk#1)
We will be gathering at the St.Charles Campaign office (1700 Lincoln Hwy,
Ste J St.Charles, IL) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors,
place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Walk #2)
We will be gathering at Starbucks in Lake Co. ( 1500 Nations Dr Gurnee, IL
60031 ) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs,
and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress. Grassroots Coordinator
Matt Duray will be on hand to answer any questions about the days tasks and
go out walking with the group.

Walk #3)
We will be gathering at the Crystal Lake Campaign office ( 6500 Northwest
Highway suite 8, Crystal Lake, IL / McHenry Co GOP Office ) at 12:30 pm to
hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people
about Oberweis for Congress. Mchenry Co Field Coordinator Robert Gibbons
will be on hand to answer any questions about the days tasks, and go out
walking with the group.

Sunday March 8th : 1:00 pm to 4pm.

Walk #4:
We will be gathering at Starbucks (1500 Nations Dr Gurnee, IL 60031) at
1:00pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak
to people about Oberweis for Congress. Grassroots Coordinator Matt Duray
will be on hand to answer any questions about the days tasks and go out
walking with the group.

Walk#5)
We will be gathering at the St.Charles Campaign office (1700 Lincoln Hwy,
Ste J St.Charles, IL) at 1:00 pm to hit the streets and knock on doors,
place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Let us know if you can make it !

We look forward to seeing everyone this weekend,

#TEAM OBERWEIS

<https://www.avast.com/sig-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=link&utm_campaign=sig-email&utm_content=webmail&utm_term=icon>
Virus-free.

Friend, **** **** **** Our election is now less than four months away. We’re ramping up our field program for the next phase of the campaign to make sure we can get to every corner of the district to connect with voters and tell them about Mondaire and his bold vision for New York’s 17th Congressional District.
We need to build our visibility in the district and part of that is ordering t-shirts, buttons, signs, and stickers so that people can show their support for Mondaire and let others know how much support we have. **_[We’re ordering all that this week, but it’s not cheap. Can you make a donation today to help us fill this order?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IgE/ni0YAA/t.2zs/LbWOwZGbSZSH8HRwdna0sw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIuzBLTeOoGI4BsyzczG2rU9TrMF-2FYoej0LebE3-2FItjE7D-2FmyBAgEA4BAa3DB4VIHnHB6TvtpM7ixkAap7JVbcOeMTi9QNj2PSReQulEZGrGnXyCe0vQ3uQlBcrgvuxP21-2FNDvwG7NV4nEcmVo47rSClRRfuKCZ3JsvtN4omTx-2FlcHJ9RitvhSW5Z8nwBlQhw1vK5mjGjoNQ9h8uPuThmNQ-2BBnNoiJoeCJgcihG5fKqUA-3D-3D/s6uI)_**
[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IgE/ni0YAA/t.2zs/LbWOwZGbSZSH8HRwdna0sw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIuzBLTeOoGI4BsyzczG2rU9TrMF-2FYoej0LebE3-2FItjExpg3PT-2FHXtmX147F3NfNW77gp5jjFMc2kERqeDuZHzIuvruF-2FUuQ2WTrvlMIhp97lQa7kNlyoAqrmrTDwUtKei7Gc8UvEbuH0W6DI9TgcgZIQpOytRO7O6iRuez8In3q9PictOPhnV9LBkT-2BGoNlibibKju4kT3YDg-2BlbGGWsIbLD0-2Fb-2BTkgs831zv0reGSjA-3D-3D/a86x)
When our volunteers go door to door or collect signatures for petitions in their neighborhood, we want to make sure everyone they see knows they’re with #TeamMondaire. Everything we order is going to help build Mondaire’s name ID so that when people go to the polls in June they know that Mondaire is the candidate their friends and neighbors are supporting.
Unlike our opponents, we don’t have corporate PACs to call up and ask to pay for everything, and we don’t have a huge personal bank account we can dip into. clean_body: Democrats are succeeding yet again in silencing the support of hard-working Americans. Please check your support below and renew your 2020 Charter Membership today to fight for our Republican Senate Majority before it is lost. Friend, According to our records, your 2020 Charter Membership lapsed and is currently INACTIVE \- We are hoping this was a mistake. Senate Republicans need grassroots conservatives like you to rally in support of President Trump and his allies in the Majority. Without you stepping up to join us now, the Democrats will succeed yet again in silencing the support of hard-working Americans. == == Supporter: == Status: INACTIVE == == == == >> With elections just 8 months away , the Democrats are gearing up for their biggest year of fundraising yet. name: Kevin Sheekey, Bloomberg 2020
subject: What happened yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
This is why we’re in this fight.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=528195daf8ac441a844fed618453abdc&_e=kgiPG-xIrEsg5RU3hITlcyAHxYtQcu8l4NPsdwyRSYQ9LoRkBv6Dp7pLfdJHMb-rBJ31jqqd_m9A2Sva7oSPMm_o_J5HldE1e5qXgqNnNjdwhp6eYlSVaNuI55ivqdQpB6oxOxCY9Y7n1KwA0SWkGJKRBIa76x2esep7M8b9CCy42AUiVTJk1NoFoVabS8E2YUST7CqV4Im0svc4SwrZSqVBiQQX2l-FVomLIkJFOyF-GiTbK9yaVce9rCuhWdC3RvQZIN6aYtnPonbsak4nLrcOXMmB2Ar6f41XKSidbXrU8eXBzGkfuVcOvDh1X1KPSejyKmhe6oZVpWL4TvM7Mrl6AOF_1-brmZewUmF2Eot0mtbdrFyPrQgshR0-Ppmy) Hey there, it’s Kevin -- For everyone who voted for Mike -- a sincere thank you. We may not know the exact delegate allocation for some time. But we are grateful to each and every one of you who got us to this point. We launched our campaign exactly 100 days before Super Tuesday. In that incredibly short time, we built a nationwide coalition focused on making a better future for America. Super Tuesday dominated the news last night. But as the results came in, I was thinking about what else happened yesterday. Tennessee declared a state of emergency after tornadoes took multiple lives and destroyed homes and businesses. The stock market swung wildly, and closed more than 780 points down -- even after emergency rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. New cases of coronavirus were confirmed in New York and North Carolina. At times like these, our country needs a proven leader. That is why we’re in this fight. Mike has shown that he has what it takes to bring people together and make progress -- on climate change, on gun safety, on job creation, on expanding health care, on crisis management and so much more. Thousands of you have joined us on this journey -- as we've gone we've gone from just 1% in the polls to being a contender for the Democratic nomination. That's why I wanted to share this video with you, featuring the voices of our supporters. Watch the video to see why we're here and what matters most in this election: [**https://www.mikebloomberg.com/2020/em-were-here**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=528195daf8ac441a844fed618453abdc&_e=kgiPG-xIrEsg5RU3hITlcyAHxYtQcu8l4NPsdwyRSYQ9LoRkBv6Dp7pLfdJHMb-rBJ31jqqd_m9A2Sva7oSPMm_o_J5HldE1e5qXgqNnNjdwhp6eYlSVaNuI55ivqdQpB6oxOxCY9Y7n1KwA0SWkGJKRBIa76x2esep7M8b9CCxRhGT-uZ8pKnE5se9yyKTohmA0-Oe4OCKXhVIfB5cv8UMrdeHcHvDFgCMYdgrve01SDpDOFLsK0H31ZXLTT1AMv7ZSVrzCa1wkv05zoneWMrOc88_MhautQeBnckrG5t0YiKQPQ4BaIbZpJmpyVb4EjrUJepBcdRRDqbumfX24jA0MZsOGJS3VTlRTfgCTEnzmQFjzexHPpCVMNvD-bRnB) Thank you for getting us this far. Our number one priority remains defeating Donald Trump in November. \- Kevin Sheekey
Campaign Manager, Bloomberg 2020

clean_body: This is why we’re in this fight. | Hey there, it’s Kevin -- For everyone who voted for Mike -- a sincere thank you. We may not know the exact delegate allocation for some time. But we are grateful to each and every one of you who got us to this point. We launched our campaign exactly 100 days before Super Tuesday. In that incredibly short time, we built a nationwide coalition focused on making a better future for America. Super Tuesday dominated the news last night. But as the results came in, I was thinking about what else happened yesterday. Tennessee declared a state of emergency after tornadoes took multiple lives and destroyed homes and businesses. The stock market swung wildly, and closed more than 780 points down -- even after emergency rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. New cases of coronavirus were confirmed in New York and North Carolina. At times like these, our country needs a proven leader. That is why we’re in this fight. Mike has shown that he has what it takes to bring people together and make progress -- on climate change, on gun safety, on job creation, on expanding health care, on crisis management and so much more. Thousands of you have joined us on this journey -- as we've gone we've gone from just 1% in the polls to being a contender for the Democratic nomination. That's why I wanted to share this video with you, featuring the voices of our supporters. Watch the video to see why we're here and what matters most in this election: Thank you for getting us this far. Our number one priority remains defeating Donald Trump in November. \- Kevin Sheekey Campaign Manager, Bloomberg 2020 | | | ---|---|--- . Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020 Mike Bloomberg 2020 909 Third Ave. New York, NY 10022 United States All content © 2020. All rights reserved.

| Peter,

| "We've had vehicles stolen... [Illegal Immigrants have] cut through fencing that divide our pastures. They've torn up our floats and our water towers that we have for our cattle and have drained our water systems." - Russell Johnson.
Beginning in 2005, Russell Johnson began to notice an increase in illegal immigration on his land. He and his family believe the border wall is the best way to solve the problem, so they [invited President Trump](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eZ2geyuspw0TdehUG1s1IPN3yanyS7mJ07edTMSemAAL_lvmGirYy3sLPJ5kOyAl-3_JxtwxFfbxYcu7vZwTMTfZjwvCA1nWYL-g16vmNrq1kl6b_OORod0VM420m8LO08ejXvCHrdslkcMIjLJ02gs6bIYrBu5tbGIxVH9N91rf_dGJe0-r9l4Vg_4kH_JKqXtU-AwceA2yUYVYY8JJyRPsFZLeYPuxaG9udcty1WhB47TrhE2FAfXz2aGLTX7O&c=QAlH8dy8r3Ncm2wHyhIZSej96c_aHanFHBbz5QQ-7X3EwEgMKFeINg==&ch=9-9Pq3Td1qghTr1fZ38XQDeiOZ4rh8UojsKbhK99ew1z2CGN4APpcQ==) to start building the wall on their land. | Rep. Xochitl Torres Small and career politicians in Washington are ignoring the crisis at the border. They oppose President Trump's wall even though it is absolutely necessary to secure the border. body:
We have to win the runoff.

|

---
Peter,

**_The Houston Chronicle_ reported that "MJ Hegar advances to runoff in U.S. Senate race as others vie for second."** For months, we've been saying that MJ -- a combat veteran and working mom -- is the best candidate to take on and beat Sen. Cornyn. **Last night, hundreds of THOUSANDS of Texans agreed!**

But that was just the first step. **We still have to win the runoff election in May.** And while we're confident MJ can get it done, we need your help to make it happen.

**We 're setting a goal of raising $75,000 by midnight to make sure we start this new phase of the campaign off strong -- and all donations before the deadline are being MATCHED! [Rush a donation now to double your impact, help us reach this crucial one-day goal, and stay on track to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902df/7f51f7bc/4dad409e/4ef18062/1362887131/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200304.1nd__1008__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Peter, not only does MJ have to win the runoff, she has to be immediately prepared to shift gears and take on Sen. Cornyn as soon as it's over. Special interests are spending big to send their yes-man back to the Senate, and we need you on our side to stop them.

**Make a matched donation before midnight tonight to help us reach our $75,000 Post-Primary Goal and start the runoff strong!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Charles Booker
subject: Mitch McConnell is blocking a bipartisan coronavirus bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
They don’t call him the grim reaper for nothing.
#
Coronavirus is a danger to public health and our economy. We need Congress to take action to help us address the threat.
So I was disappointed — not shocked, but disappointed — to hear that **Mitch McConnell spent the last week blocking a bipartisan compromise bill** because it limits how much Big Pharma can charge Americans for vaccines.
**This is what Mitch has always done.** He’s always placed profits over people. Because that’s what his corporate donors want.
**Kentucky has had enough.** Mitch Gotta GO. And we can make that happen if I can get your help today...

clean_body: They don’t call him the grim reaper for nothing. Coronavirus is a danger to public health and our economy. We need Congress to take action to help us address the threat. So I was disappointed — not shocked, but disappointed — to hear that Mitch McConnell spent the last week blocking a bipartisan compromise bill because it limits how much Big Pharma can charge Americans for vaccines. This is what Mitch has always done. He’s always placed profits over people. Because that’s what his corporate donors want. Kentucky has had enough. Mitch Gotta GO. And we can make that happen if I can get your help today... = = Together we are going to put an end to Mitch’s reign in the United States Senate. With you on board, I’m confident of that. Thank you for everything, Charles Booker = | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: I need your response, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Your input is critical to making sure we can flip this seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.
| | |
---
Friend,

It's only been a month since we launched our campaign for U.S. Senate - but already, the momentum behind our fight to flip Georgia blue is _incredible._
While my wealthy opponent is pouring millions of her own fortune into this race to try and buy this seat, I'm running a grassroots campaign that puts _your_ interests, _your_ priorities and _your_ concerns front and center.

**That's why I need to hear from you directly. Your input is critical to making sure we can flip this seat and take back the Senate for Democrats:** **[Will you take just a moment of your day to let me know what issues matter most to you in this election?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk80-su-op")**
| | [Take the Survey](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk80-su-op")
---
Experts agree that Democrats _can_ take back the Senate in November - and _The Washington Post_ reports that winning in Georgia is key to making that happen.
So to win on Election Day, we've got to have a grassroots team - made up of people like you, friend - fighting alongside us every step of the way. **But with our midnight survey deadline just hours away, I'm missing your response:**

[Please, friend, take our survey so we can craft a winning strategy to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate this November.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk80-su-op")
| | [Take the Survey](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-priorities-refresh?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk80-su-op")
---
Thank you for all that you do.
Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Mike Bloomberg
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=d3d605d0c6b64f3b83417022616a774a&_e=vH4Ry9DSuQTLpzw9Z55Rqn3o0IWFcv1lGDXBTzwdBEFcgIeAJVFr1B8luRdYM-OBiwbv-w_D6hWMKrpqZa1z12OQSinKVApYvORI3YLP52SJzDOlVdCRu5A1baox_g69VUDNBYqd-z9cmbV66PThXl-M5ZzUVJTEJ15hkHR3NciNvgjHWkynQwF3X9cQnPrLiFeVV-XMUmYwU1tukKvLRGfNqhoLwXu4NbSOcH4D3xnGWetOxvpojkU6YBtX5DveGzm8GC8UqVYvM9i3S0OhBg%3D%3D) Dear friend, I couldn't be more grateful for the support you've given our campaign -- and I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart. In just a few months, we built an incredible team whose hard work lifted us into contention. Yesterday, we won nearly two million votes, thanks to your involvement and help. But we did not achieve all that we had hoped to. Three months ago, I entered the race for President to defeat Donald Trump. Today, I am leaving the race for the same reason: to defeat Donald Trump -- because it is clear to me that staying in would make achieving that goal more difficult. I'm a believer in using data to inform decisions. After yesterday's results, the delegate math has become virtually impossible -- and a viable path to the nomination no longer exists. But I remain clear-eyed about my overriding objective: victory in November. Not for me, but for our country. And so while I will not be the nominee, I will not walk away from the most important political fight of my life. I've always believed that defeating Donald Trump starts with uniting behind the candidate with the best shot to do it. After yesterday's vote, it is clear that candidate is my friend and a great American, Joe Biden. I've known Joe for a very long time. I know his decency, his honesty, and his commitment to the issues that are so important to our country -- including gun safety, health care, climate change, and good jobs. I've had the chance to work with Joe on those issues over the years, and Joe has fought for working people his whole life. Today I am glad to endorse him -- and I will work to make him the next President of the United States. I am immensely proud of the campaign we ran, the issues we raised, and the sweeping and achievable plans we proposed -- including our Greenwood Initiative to right historic wrongs, fight racial inequality, and make the promise of equal opportunity real for the Black communities that have endured centuries of exploitation and discrimination. That work is fundamental to the future of our country -- and to the more perfect union that each generation is called to build. I am deeply grateful to all the Americans who voted for me -- and to our incredibly dedicated staff and volunteers all around the country, who knocked on more than two million doors and held 12 million voter conversations, in an incredibly short amount of time. No one outworked our team, and I couldn't be prouder of everyone who was part of it. And I will be forever grateful to all the mayors, local and state legislators, Members of Congress and many others who believed in me, endorsed my candidacy, and worked hard to unite voters around our vision. Your support and trust sustained me, and I look forward to working with you in the months and years ahead. We made our campaign slogan a clear, simple promise: Mike will get it done. And I intend to keep working on the "it." I will continue to work for sensible, common sense policy solutions that can get done. That includes passing gun safety laws that save lives. Fighting climate change. Improving health care. Making college more accessible and affordable. Creating economic opportunity for all. And helping mayors and local leaders across the country who are doing so much important work on all of these issues. The past few months have been some of the most inspiring of my life, and I want to thank the tens of thousands of Americans, from Maine to California, whom I was privileged to meet -- and who every day, with their voices and their ideas, made this campaign such a powerful experience. And I am intent on making it a lasting experience: I want my supporters to stay engaged, stay active and stay committed to our issues. I will be right there with you. And together, we will get it done. Mike
---

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=d3d605d0c6b64f3b83417022616a774a&_e=vH4Ry9DSuQTLpzw9Z55RqnMKuga4pwb7NHu4bct44UsiIZJ_jlc-NAMnOJwGUrGStRkcbTNqdcCYBwnngznVC8pirhXO92p58XXjkulzxzHCB0Z6zG4DMEZcmqiBkxgi2zuAkj3WLXkGqLma0tjJENL0BZO-lY558lUo0tudigODDdFqT2YzMETfd_4xiEeZCEgN6X70Y_i5JzeseHqZ7R3RACl1q2F5xvyJDrzzZhn0gjGUF_yUoBE8FIL4XEXf16Won_wH_Aw_WHKUgoYlBQ%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=d3d605d0c6b64f3b83417022616a774a&_e=vH4Ry9DSuQTLpzw9Z55RqkC0L5JvGt6n8Zn6ZP3P2FhRX2sQzTsStbHGZDA5wnDWC1aTliMJmVGITqsmeVpg1yTdEd8NYfOZWwkVUPlDmIZoWjliWJ5Pn-Csusepvpxj6EYscmt7bzZmfMpCflx3tZxbOq1ONJxZSM391RB-iOgQ_41MwFjaip2xV5AK8u6phUQbQ4DcuQ_nAt3IAdVnafhFFjnhuDk90Ye1rPAL_yBN708tsL_ZIYQH1wIPNXHXDQCAqvrt4j5PATPjKlgHbg%3D%3D)
---|---|---

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: Truly honored!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DfDSsZhYiZlI_yBS5YNTRmvRIah5CRQ6BUdL9mHW_-NLhTvK6_b3ym8M5AV-8FWOFZGsW-3oxTyeNB4JZuBmAKFpsjbKrAsSloO7SWGbvxC2DFjzyN46DPXYideILR2KUbwfKXtt9CLRo3dLSLx_MHJOEKCzSMLQ&c=5nP-ruJnZJUADovGIUji8aUlbNIBsPwUXC4w1ESPr-x4LTMPDywnaw==&ch=Ecxn-pzsOzpAo1vAsypMYaDl9G_MZu-Dacp5wnd-TrIib8aBspNTGQ==)
---
| Peter,
To my family, my friends, and my supporters, I owe you all a massive debt of gratitude. It has been my honor to earn your support, hear your stories, and travel across Dallas and Collin Counties meeting the hard working people of the 32nd district.
The wide swaths of support our campaign received last night from across the district is humbling, and [I am proud to be the Republican nominee for Congress in District 32.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DfDSsZhYiZlI_yBS5YNTRmvRIah5CRQ6BUdL9mHW_-NLhTvK6_b3ykhio6wRNFbm79g8OEmDoum9xZpBvLMu55bRC0ULwS_cWiZiP9vWeUMlscRSJe76COyHKDQ_5P1g0V6pqOxl92tyoXx7Lp4Fh-E5rpXQgisqbXZ1BMXnXOUgCrYW3nFvyQ==&c=5nP-ruJnZJUADovGIUji8aUlbNIBsPwUXC4w1ESPr-x4LTMPDywnaw==&ch=Ecxn-pzsOzpAo1vAsypMYaDl9G_MZu-Dacp5wnd-TrIib8aBspNTGQ==)
[It is more important than ever that we unite and confront what we're all up against - Colin Allred and a Democratic party that grows more radical each day.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DfDSsZhYiZlI_yBS5YNTRmvRIah5CRQ6BUdL9mHW_-NLhTvK6_b3ykhio6wRNFbm79g8OEmDoum9xZpBvLMu55bRC0ULwS_cWiZiP9vWeUMlscRSJe76COyHKDQ_5P1g0V6pqOxl92tyoXx7Lp4Fh-E5rpXQgisqbXZ1BMXnXOUgCrYW3nFvyQ==&c=5nP-ruJnZJUADovGIUji8aUlbNIBsPwUXC4w1ESPr-x4LTMPDywnaw==&ch=Ecxn-pzsOzpAo1vAsypMYaDl9G_MZu-Dacp5wnd-TrIib8aBspNTGQ==)
He campaigned as a moderate in 2018, his record has been anything but. He votes with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez 94% of the time. He continually joins his liberal bosses in voting to harm the North Texas economy and he has made his support for radical policies very clear.
Colin Allred does not share our Texas values of limited government and fierce independence. [Over the next eight months, I look forward to sharing my positive vision for the 32nd district we all know and love](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DfDSsZhYiZlI_yBS5YNTRmvRIah5CRQ6BUdL9mHW_-NLhTvK6_b3ykhio6wRNFbm79g8OEmDoum9xZpBvLMu55bRC0ULwS_cWiZiP9vWeUMlscRSJe76COyHKDQ_5P1g0V6pqOxl92tyoXx7Lp4Fh-E5rpXQgisqbXZ1BMXnXOUgCrYW3nFvyQ==&c=5nP-ruJnZJUADovGIUji8aUlbNIBsPwUXC4w1ESPr-x4LTMPDywnaw==&ch=Ecxn-pzsOzpAo1vAsypMYaDl9G_MZu-Dacp5wnd-TrIib8aBspNTGQ==). A vision deeply rooted in my career in business, where I've created hundreds of jobs and seen first-hand what it means to be fiscally responsible and balance a budget.
We've got an exciting eight months ahead of us, and the work begins today!
---
| Let's do this,
---
|
---
| Geneveive Collins Candidate for Congressional District 32

Mitch McConnell stole an appointment from President Obama, and in doing so swung the court hard to the right. Then Kavanaugh’s confirmation happened.

**If we lose, states across the country – including Georgia – could have a clear path to pass their own draconian abortion restrictions. It will only make winning back the Senate and removing McConnell from power as Majority Leader that much more important. But right now, the most important thing we can do is raise our voice.**

**[Add your name to demand an END to attacks on women’s reproductive freedom. body:

| | Did you see the latest Boston Globe poll? **Joe is winning by 6 points over a 47-year incumbent - 42% to 36%. (!!) ** Now, it's early. This is one poll, and we've got a long road ahead. But here are some promising findings that we are keeping our eye on:
* Voters overwhelmingly think Joe is the best candidate to take on Donald Trump.

* Joe leads in communities of color - as he has since the start of this campaign - where his commitment to showing up, to listening and lifting up, is resonating deeply.

* And Joe is leading with young people, who are hungry for new, progressive leadership.

**Will you pitch in to help us continue our momentum? Senator Markey has the advantages of a deeply entrenched incumbent. To win, we have to bring in thousands of new people and build an entirely new grassroots operation. Every dollar counts.** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903a7/55b66746/235aea77/80fc2bc/4005082130/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-03-04-poll&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$9](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903a7/55b66746/235aea77/80fc2bd/4005082130/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=2020-03-04-poll&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Celebrating Kansas women
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Kansas history is rich with women who helped make our state and country a better, more just place to live.

Friends --

When I was elected Mayor of Topeka in 2017, I thought about all of the courageous Kansas women who came before me and paved the way for our generation of women to stand up and lead in our communities.

Kansas history is rich with women who helped make our state and country a better, more just place to live. This is especially true for women in public service. Back in 1887, Kansas was the first state in the nation to have a female mayor when Susanna Salters was elected Mayor of Argonia, Kansas. Kansas is also one of only a handful of states to elect three women as governors -- Joan Finney, Kathleen Sebelius, and now, Governor Laura Kelly.

March is Women's History Month, and I wouldn't be standing here as the Mayor of Topeka and a candidate for U.S. Congress if not for the contributions of these women, and so many others, who fought and sacrificed to make a better world for their daughters and granddaughters. For that, I am so grateful.

I also want to take a moment to thank you, friend. It's because of your support that we were able to hit our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline, and now, we are one step closer to lifting up the voices of all Kansans in Washington.

When I get to Congress, I will continue to stand up for women's rights and advocate for our amazing mothers, sisters, and daughters. Will you join me in this fight?

Thank you,

Michelle

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Thanks to Trump Administration, the United States Has a Coronavirus Plan of Action
body:
"At a time when coronavirus was just getting on the radar, the administration took decisive steps to mitigate the spread of the virus..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5c8245b4e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# Thanks to Trump Administration, the United States Has a Coronavirus Plan of Action

“While the potential damages of a pandemic are in general large, the analyses thus far on the coronavirus are largely global in nature and fail to account for the rapid federal response to secure the country and create a cure,” Bradley Blakeman and Christos Makridis write for _The Washington Times_.

“That’s evident in a recent Gallup poll that found 77 percent of the population is very or somewhat confident in the government’s ability to handle the coronavirus, up significantly from 58 percent from the Ebola virus in 2014 and 67 percent from the swine flu in 2009,” they explain.

“At a time when coronavirus was just getting on the radar, the administration took decisive steps to mitigate the spread of the virus to the United States.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=366440ed99&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “U.S. companies kept adding jobs in February despite the coronavirus scare, as private payrolls expanded well above the pace that Wall Street had anticipated. Employment excluding government jobs rose by 183,000 for the month . . . topping the 155,000 that economists surveyed by Dow Jones had expected,” Jeff Cox reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=960f4434da&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “I have been studying and reporting on emerging contagions for many years. I have seen them mismanaged, hyped and poorly messaged. In fact, I have never seen a new virus or bacteria handled as well by our public health officials as this one, with sober attention paid to identifying, isolating and tracing contacts of known or suspected cases along with restricting travel as best they can,” Dr. Marc Siegel writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0352abb3ad&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| More than 700 miles of new U.S.–Mexico border wall have either already been built or are in the process of being built, Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf says. Wolf added that the border wall is one of many steps being taken to curb illegal immigration and support Border Patrol officers, Matthew Boyle reports for [_Breitbart_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8730afd0a1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92a774cf8e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=634d3d093c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6eb4868a0d)
---

---

name: Eugene for Congress
subject: Check out our newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
February was quite the month on Team Eugene, so we wanted to take a moment to share some of the exciting things we’ve been up to!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15721668/166181675/464986751?refcode=em_news_2020.03.04_b1_efc_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZkNjQxNy02YzVlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWRuDmxK14L7SI5rVWvE2SHh0Dhp7y5gyFhd_3pXQyw=) Team,

February was quite the month on Team Eugene, so we wanted to take a moment to share some of the exciting things we’ve been up to!

**We made it official:** We filed to be on the ballot with nearly 3,500 petition signatures! This was only possible because of our incredible network of volunteers and the incredible supporters who invited us into their homes for petition parties. We can’t thank you enough. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15721669/166181676/464986751?refcode=em_news_2020.03.04_b1_efc_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZkNjQxNy02YzVlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWRuDmxK14L7SI5rVWvE2SHh0Dhp7y5gyFhd_3pXQyw=)
**We were out in the community:** Eugene was honored to join the Harrisburg community to celebrate Black History Month. He also spoke at the York County Federation of Democratic Women luncheon, [**which you can read about here,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15721670/166181677/-698221400?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZkNjQxNy02YzVlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWRuDmxK14L7SI5rVWvE2SHh0Dhp7y5gyFhd_3pXQyw=&emci=722f2468-595e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=adfd6417-6c5e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) and joined REACH!, an organization in Carlisle that provides life skills training through education and art, for an important conversation about gun violence in our community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15721671/166181678/464986751?refcode=em_news_2020.03.04_b1_efc_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZkNjQxNy02YzVlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWRuDmxK14L7SI5rVWvE2SHh0Dhp7y5gyFhd_3pXQyw=)
**We earned new endorsements:** Eugene was endorsed by the Dauphin County Democratic Committee and Clean Water Action Pennsylvania! They know that Eugene is going to go to Congress to fight for the people of South Central PA, and we are so grateful to have their support along the way.

**We built on our grassroots momentum:** We held canvassing events every weekend in February and had the opportunity to speak with voters in York, Hershey, and Carlisle. We also encouraged new voters to engage in the process by registering voters at York College. We are so grateful to our amazing volunteers and interns. [**If you’re interested in volunteering with the campaign, you can sign up here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15721672/166181679/1398320652?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZkNjQxNy02YzVlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWRuDmxK14L7SI5rVWvE2SHh0Dhp7y5gyFhd_3pXQyw=&emci=722f2468-595e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=adfd6417-6c5e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249) [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15721673/166181680/464986751?refcode=em_news_2020.03.04_b1_efc_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZkNjQxNy02YzVlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWRuDmxK14L7SI5rVWvE2SHh0Dhp7y5gyFhd_3pXQyw=)**We are ready for more:** We have several upcoming events, and we hope you consider attending one (_or more_)! **Meet and Greet with Harrisburg Council President Wanda Williams**
Thursday, March 19, 2020, 5:00 - 7:00 PM
S Club, 2940 N 7th St, Harrisburg, PA 17110 [**Eugene's Millersburg Town Hall** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15721674/166181681/-1186138309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZkNjQxNy02YzVlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWRuDmxK14L7SI5rVWvE2SHh0Dhp7y5gyFhd_3pXQyw=&emci=722f2468-595e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=adfd6417-6c5e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=10203249)

Wednesday, April 15, 2020, 6:00 - 7:30 PM
**We want you to join us:** We’re building a people-powered movement in South Central Pennsylvania -- and we want you to be a part of it. Eugene doesn’t have dark money groups and special interests bankrolling his campaign, so we’re relying on everyday people like you to help us continue our work to flip PA-10 blue. clean_body: February was quite the month on Team Eugene, so we wanted to take a moment to share some of the exciting things we’ve been up to! = Team, February was quite the month on Team Eugene, so we wanted to take a moment to share some of the exciting things we’ve been up to! We made it official: We filed to be on the ballot with nearly 3,500 petition signatures! This was only possible because of our incredible network of volunteers and the incredible supporters who invited us into their homes for petition parties. We can’t thank you enough. = We were out in the community: Eugene was honored to join the Harrisburg community to celebrate Black History Month. He also spoke at the York County Federation of Democratic Women luncheon, and joined REACH!, an organization in Carlisle that provides life skills training through education and art, for an important conversation about gun violence in our community. = We earned new endorsements: Eugene was endorsed by the Dauphin County Democratic Committee and Clean Water Action Pennsylvania! They know that Eugene is going to go to Congress to fight for the people of South Central PA, and we are so grateful to have their support along the way. We built on our grassroots momentum: We held canvassing events every weekend in February and had the opportunity to speak with voters in York, Hershey, and Carlisle. We also encouraged new voters to engage in the process by registering voters at York College. We are so grateful to our amazing volunteers and interns. are ready for more: We have several upcoming events, and we hope you consider attending one (or more)! Meet and Greet with Harrisburg Council President Wanda Williams Thursday, March 19, 2020, 5:00 - 7:00 PM S Club, 2940 N 7th St, Harrisburg, PA 17110 Thursday, April 2, 2020, 6:00 - 7:30 PM Wednesday, April 15, 2020, 6:00 - 7:30 PM We want you to join us: We’re building a people-powered movement in South Central Pennsylvania -- and we want you to be a part of it. Eugene doesn’t have dark money groups and special interests bankrolling his campaign, so we’re relying on everyday people like you to help us continue our work to flip PA-10 blue. = = Don’t forget to follow Eugene on and to stay up to date with the latest campaign news. Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign! \--Team Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit . | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. subject: The DNC chooses “Quid Pro” Joe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sXj56PvvRKKULUGh4C12GChOS0OytO1FNZiqNIhZ6jUcZTBE_TC1fZ8x8nLQqfDophf5h_bBr1dohE_UIOIXHT_OEWo4O4M_PEB90JCsgcLrRDTSMxak0IUNXEs-fBK3Zr6uuxb6yhJ2IdZJDOo34mLYlOU00v_TBZeY58xpOMs=&c=eMSf_J_Ka_V0gPhBRL_hP_Rpv0Kyrwu1ZYqNv91nPD3_XodtQNWRtA==&ch=t3xL3aCiFjoLXVUmkgQTnVObuLg9cGLd20izksQoWQ5DFqLONnbp3w==)

| Patriot,
It seems the DNC has chosen its candidate. The establishment has lined up behind Joe Biden as a last-ditch effort to beat President Trump in the 2020 election.
Now, the mainstream media will begin their all-out effort to elect "Quid Pro" Joe. They will completely ignore the fact that Biden ousted the Ukrainian prosecutor who was investigating Burisma Holdings, the corrupt oil & gas company that employed his son, Hunter Biden.
---
| | | [EXPOSE QUID PRO JOE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sXj56PvvRKKULUGh4C12GChOS0OytO1FNZiqNIhZ6jUcZTBE_TC1fZ8x8nLQqfDophf5h_bBr1dohE_UIOIXHT_OEWo4O4M_PEB90JCsgcLrRDTSMxak0IUNXEs-fBK3Zr6uuxb6yhJ2IdZJDOo34mLYlOU00v_TBZeY58xpOMs=&c=eMSf_J_Ka_V0gPhBRL_hP_Rpv0Kyrwu1ZYqNv91nPD3_XodtQNWRtA==&ch=t3xL3aCiFjoLXVUmkgQTnVObuLg9cGLd20izksQoWQ5DFqLONnbp3w==)
---
| The media is supposed to hold politicians accountable, but instead, they set double standards to protect their preferred candidates out of hatred for President Trump.
Just like in 2016, we will be up against the media, the swamp, and the radical left who all want to tear down President Trump. Will you join me in defending the President from the deluge of attacks about to come?
---

name: Kathy Manning
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Thank you.
|
---

| | We've overcome the first big test of our campaign -- yesterday, we won the primary election! Thank you for all your help. I am humbled by all of the support I've received from North Carolinians here in the Triad. **Now, onward to Election Day!** [_**Chip in to bring home another victory in November ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d347/3d199a51/2f6ff049/7364f6b6/3194177752/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDMwNCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuYyJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200304?refcode=kme200304_nc_other&refcode2=17426") We can't take a break -- not even for a moment -- because we have big plans for Washington, including: \- Ensuring access to **affordable health care** and lowering the **cost of prescription drugs**
\- Improving **education** and **training** opportunities to give everyone the tools for success
\- Strengthening the **economy** and fighting for **good-paying jobs**
\- Finding and implementing solutions to combat the effects of **climate change**
\- Instituting common sense **gun-safety measures** to prevent future tragedies
\- Safeguarding**reproductive rights** in the face of the unprecedented attacks on choice
\- Protecting **Social Security and Medicare** If we're going to make all of that happen, then we need to raise the resources to build a strong campaign that can withstand the fight to the general election. Because it's going to be a tough battle to the finish line. North Carolina holds the key to the House Majority, and our district is one of the biggest 2020 pick-up opportunities. [_**Yesterday proved we have the drive and the momentum. Now, we need to keep building on it. Will you make a contribution to push us to another victory on Election Day and flip this critical seat from red to blue?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d347/3d199a51/2f6ff049/7364f6b6/3194177752/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDMwNCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuYyJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200304?refcode=kme200304_nc_other&refcode2=17426") Thank you, Kathy | | | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d347/3d199a51/2f6ff049/7364f6b6/3194177752/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDMwNCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuYyJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200304?refcode=kme200304_nc_other&refcode2=17426")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: 2nd District Not For Sale!
body:
Super Tuesday was a catastrophic failure for the Democratic Party, and quite frankly, the only winner of yesterday was our President, Donald J. Trump. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/2nd-district-not-for-sale?e=90fad69796)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# _**Iowa's 2nd District****is NOT For Sale**_
The Super Tuesday results were a disaster yesterday for the Democratic Socialist Party of America. With no definitive front runner , the real winner yesterday was our great President, Donald J. Trump as he won each Republican primary with record turnouts, thanks to those who stand up for traditional values.

In the 2nd district however, we have our own version of Big Money Mike Bloomberg’s disastrous campaign - her name is Mariannette Miller-Meeks. She has spent $734,128.59 of her own money in her last three failed campaigns trying to buy this seat in Congress. We must come together to reject Mariannette Miller-Meeks. The Second District is not for sale! We must win in November's General Election in order to have a true conservative sitting at the table.

Please come out on June 2nd and cast your vote for Bobby Schilling, a proven winner that will continue the great work in Washington D.C. that we can all be proud of!

For Iowa,

\- Bobby Schilling
---

name: Progressive Majority
subject: Where the race stands post-Super Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter \-- After South Carolina's primary upended the Democratic race this weekend \-- leading Pete Buttigieg and Amy Klobuchar to drop out \-- yesterday's results could be the last big shake-up in the nomination fight. Before big names began dropping out, 21% of Democrats polled said they might stay home in November if their candidate didn't win. If more than 1 in 5 Democrats stay home in November, Trump WILL be re-elected. We need to know where you stand after Super Tuesday: | | **Will you vote in November to stop Donald Trump?**
[ Yes
No](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5cb6/5360b1c8/2d4278f1/b071d45/1856010207/VEsH/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/yF7ny46p") |

Progressive Majority

Hey Peter -- yesterday we took _first_ in the Democratic primary! It was a **huge boost** to our momentum, and we're not the only ones to say so! Just look at the headlines:
"Hegar has easily run the most effective Democratic campaign, analysts say"
\-- _The Dallas Morning News_

"MJ Hegar advances to runoff in U.S. Senate race as others vie for second"
_\-- The Houston Chronicle_
It's clear that MJ is the best candidate to take on Sen. John Cornyn in November. As a combat veteran who earned a Purple Heart and a working mom who's faced the struggles so many Texans deal with every day, she'll put up the fight we need to win.

**[But it won't be easy, and MJ needs your support. With a ONE-DAY match in effect, now is the perfect time to donate, so pitch in before midnight and DOUBLE your impact >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648902d9/7f51f7bc/4dae188a/4ef180c9/3129480130/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-postprimary?refcode=email_20200304.2nd__1013__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**We 've got to keep this momentum rolling in the runoff**. Mitch McConnell, Sen. Cornyn, and all of their corporate cronies are paying attention. They're going to try to tank our progress because they know MJ is a real threat. **Our job right now is to prevent them from slowing us down.**

We've gained a bunch of momentum over the past months, and right now is a critical time to pitch into this grassroots campaign and help push our message through the runoff. **Make a matched donation before tonight 's midnight deadline to double your impact and keep MJ's momentum going!**

body:

**Here is where these races stand:**

| **Arizona:**
Mark Kelly vs. Martha McSally [+4]

**Colorado:**
John Hickenlooper vs. Cory Gardner **[TOSS-UP]**

**Kansas:**
Dr. Barbara Bollier vs. Kris Kobach **[TOSS-UP]**

**Maine:**
Sara Gideon vs. Susan Collins [+1]

**Kentucky:**
Amy McGrath vs Mitch McConnell **[TOSS-UP]**

**South Carolina:**
Jaime Harrison vs. Lindsey Graham [+2]

---

We can elect candidates like Mark Kelly, John Hickenlooper, and Barbara Bollier -- **but with races this close we need your help.**

| Derek, I wish I could say I am surprised. After the NH Senate laid the “Born-Alive Protection Act” on the table, NH House Judiciary just voted **along party lines** to kill the House version of the “Born Alive Infant Protection Act” This bill would protect an infant that is born alive - just what is controversial about that? Babies that take their first breath should be entitled to the same medical care provided to any human being. I am not surprised because we see Democrats across the nation go to extreme measures to side with Planned Parenthood and other special interests. That is why I am personally asking you to [contribute $25, $50, $100, or your most generous contribution today](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xMzY5NzI1MTg4MzQxNTAzMDMyJmM9dDBwNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMjUxMTAxNDgmZD1kN3gwdzNp.tVXKzIR3ZA5fWvhVxIApuhRIHvE4UPY1benueBk_Kuw) so we can flip the NH House and restore sanity to New Hampshire. name: Cory Booker
subject: This is about Obamacare.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| The Affordable Care Act is at stake. Team, the Supreme Court announced earlier this week that they would consider a case challenging the Affordable Care Act (known to many as Obamacare). This represents yet another attempt, led by Republicans, to undermine President Obama's signature health care law. The Affordable Care Act has expanded coverage to millions of Americans. There's a lot at stake in this case. If the conservative-leaning Supreme Court strikes down Obamacare, the impact would be devastating on those who've come to rely upon the law as an affordable means to access coverage. The Court's eventual ruling could even result in the end of protections for those with pre-existing conditions. **[In this moment, we have to make our voices heard. Add your name here if you support the Affordable Care Act and want to continue making health care more accessible to all.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/protect-the-affordable-care-act?source=em_pet_20200304_CB_20200304-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** President Obama deserves a lot of credit for his leadership in getting this landmark legislation passed into law. Years after he left office, Republicans are still trying to take away his legacy-defining accomplishment -- without any regard for the people it helps. Make no mistake about it, there's still more work to do to expand access to health care. But, if the Supreme Court were to invalidate Obamacare, that would be a major step backwards and put many of the most vulnerable Americans in harm's way. **[If you agree that Obamacare should be protected and remain law, sign your name here. We can't turn our backs on those who depend on the coverage they receive through the Affordable Care Act.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/protect-the-affordable-care-act?source=em_pet_20200304_CB_20200304-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I imagine a country where every single American has access to high-quality, affordable health care. As a member of the United States Senate, I am going to keep working as hard as I can each and every day to move us closer to that vision. Health care is a human right. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/protect-the-affordable-care-act?source=em_pet_20200304_CB_20200304-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa9/5fca0d19/7a2f9c28/291d03c2/2246734429/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa9/5fca0d19/7a2f9c28/291d03c1/2246734429/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa9/5fca0d19/7a2f9c28/291d03c0/2246734429/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa9/5fca0d19/7a2f9c28/291d03cf/2246734429/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").
