| | **We have less than one week to go until the candidate filing deadline here in Oregon. Just a few days until we know which Republican is going to attempt to defeat us in November.** Mitch McConnell and the special interests bankrolling him are working overtime to protect the Republican Senate majority and ensure that, no matter what happens with Donald Trump, Republicans can continue to obstruct progress after the election. The filing deadline is the official kick-off of the campaign. It is when the battle is joined and our movement will be tested. [**Will you donate now and become a founding member of our 2020 We the People Fund? We'll use every dollar of this fund to fuel our grassroots organizing effort.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ed09/6cd27893/53d1f0c1/15900c81/2520349524/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-04-filing-n&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") In 2008, we built the biggest grassroots movement in Oregon's history and defeated the incumbent Republican U.S. Senator. In 2014, the Koch Brothers spent $3 million attacking me on the airwaves, and millions more online, but the strength of our grassroots movement prevailed. In 2020, our grassroots movement will do it again for Oregon, for the nation, for the future. **We know the stakes. We have a plan. And soon, we'll know who our opponent is. clean_body: | "" | | We have less than one week to go until the candidate filing deadline here in Oregon. Just a few days until we know which Republican is going to attempt to defeat us in November. Mitch McConnell and the special interests bankrolling him are working overtime to protect the Republican Senate majority and ensure that, no matter what happens with Donald Trump, Republicans can continue to obstruct progress after the election. The filing deadline is the official kick-off of the campaign. It is when the battle is joined and our movement will be tested. "" In 2008, we built the biggest grassroots movement in Oregon's history and defeated the incumbent Republican U.S. Senator. In 2014, the Koch Brothers spent $3 million attacking me on the airwaves, and millions more online, but the strength of our grassroots movement prevailed. In 2020, our grassroots movement will do it again for Oregon, for the nation, for the future. We know the stakes. We have a plan. And soon, we'll know who our opponent is. And you better believe that if we give them a chance, the SuperPACs will bring everything they've got. "" Jeff Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. ---|--- | ""

body:
|

Friend, Last night, Joe Biden and Bernie Sanders emerged as the two clear frontrunners for the Democratic nomination for president. The mainstream media wants us to believe Biden's rise in the polls is a sign the Democrat Party is becoming more moderate, but this couldn't be further from the truth. We have seen Joe Biden throughout his career attack our values and stand for every radical leftist policy you can imagine. **Biden was a key player in getting Obamacare passed, believes in a radical environmental agenda, and even admitted he will raise our taxes!** Bernie Sanders stands with Joe Biden on these radical beliefs, and takes it even further. He supports a socialist agenda that would take away our healthcare choices, redistribute our hard-earned money, and bankrupt our nation. **The radical left is motivated to attack our values and undo every single win President Trump has secured.** I refuse to let a radical liberal like Joe Biden or Bernie Sanders ever occupy the White House. [Will you join me in stopping them from spreading socialism across our country?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/hAl0LKQagCAeT7IZ3VWcWA/k16dI0a4ZMPKl0SBfGKvpg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/hAl0LKQagCAeT7IZ3VWcWA/k16dI0a4ZMPKl0SBfGKvpg) This fall, we are faced with the most important election of our lifetime. Dear Friend, Thank you so much for the support you've given me over the last two and half years. Sometimes it's hard to believe how far we've come, and of course I could never have done it without you. Now we've advanced to the next phase of our journey. The race for this open seat has come into focus. Pete Sessions has emerged as the clear front runner for the Republican nomination. There _is_ a path to victory against Sessions and we have a responsibility to do everything in our power to walk that path. To do so, we have to do what no Democrat in Central Texas has done for over a decade - raise the resources necessary to run a truly competitive congressional campaign. body:
It's going to be a beautiful day, so head on out and knock some doors with #TeamDani | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/24ef39afd0a9/knock-doors-for-dani-in-lasalle-this-weekend?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
# Help #TeamDani get the word out in LaSalle!
Our team will be out knocking doors in LaSalle from 1-4 pm this Saturday, March 7th.

It's going to be sunny and 54 degrees, so come enjoy the beautiful weather and help us get the word out about Dani!

We will be meeting at the Lock 16 cafe in LaSalle (754 1st St.) and breaking into teams after some brief training.

You can RSVP and find out more info by clicking [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b46f3f5e30&e=140a9b81e7) or by reaching out to our team at 815 322 1124.

Hope to see you there!

#TeamDani

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: New Staff and Volunteer Signup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ian Todd for Congress
body:
New volunteer coordinator and exciting opportunities! | | | |
---
| | |
## Hello, everyone!
My name is Julius Kapushinski, and I have been officially brought on board as the Head Volunteer Coordinator. I will be in charge of all volunteer efforts for building our movement, helping to organize our strategies, and getting our Congressional nominee, Ian Todd, elected.

When I first met Ian back in 2018, his commitment and drive inspired me to get on board. His passion, positivity, and excitement have motivated me, and helped me to jump into the world of politics feet-first. This is a movement that I fully believe in, and one that I am incredibly excited to be a part of.

This election we will be building from the ground up, and I will need your help to do it. If you are interested in volunteering in any capacity, whether it's knocking on doors, sending out phone calls or texts, attending parades or fairs, hosting a house party, or simply having a yard sign on your property, send me an email at julius@iantoddforcongress.com. With your email include your full name, phone number, email, street address, and the types of volunteering that you would like to do.

I will be organizing a call with those that sign up, and I look forward to hearing from each and every one of you about your reasons for supporting this movement, and what I can do in my position to make sure that you have everything you need to succeed.

Now let's get out there and build power together!
---

subject: The leftist gun grabbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Our 2nd Amendment Rights are under attack. Democratic frontrunner Biden just received an endorsement from Beto O'Rourke. What did Beto get in return? | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/361bd292960b/its-time-to-run-to-the-fight-6265297?e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| | |
# Our 2nd Amendment Rights are under attack
Democratic frontrunner Joe Biden just received an endorsement from Beto O'Rourke. What quid pro quo did Beto get in return? (Don't worry it's fine when they do it.) _**[Biden promised](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f38887ccc8&e=1050d051da) that Beto would be in charge of gun control**_ if Biden were to become President.

What does that mean for us? Well, who can forget this clip from when Beto was running for President just a few months ago. _**He said, "Hell yes, we're going to take your AR-15!"**_
---
| [Chip in to Stop These Leftist Gun Grabbers](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a152fa9f95&e=1050d051da "Chip in to Stop These Leftist Gun Grabbers")
---
|
---
| It is no mystery what the left hopes to achieve on gun control. Beto was just the one to say in public what they generally say in private. They do not trust gun owners and they want to take guns out of the hands of law-abiding Americans.

_**This is unacceptable and we will not stand for it!**_

Our Constitutional Rights are at stake this election, and that's why we must continue to stand strong with President Trump.

Unlike his primary opponent who did not even vote for President Trump in 2016 over Hillary Clinton, Jake remains a strong member of the team of Republican fighters helping re-elect President Trump, and he will continue to fight alongside him in Washington D.C. as a member of Congress. _**That's why we are fighting to help elect Jake to Congress.**_

[Will you pitch in to stop these gun grabbers? Anything helps. $45, $22, or even $9.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ab460a6158&e=1050d051da)
---
| Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

Unlike his primary opponent who did not even vote for President Trump in 2016 over Hillary Clinton, Jake remains a strong member of the team of Republican fighters helping re-elect President Trump, and he will continue to fight alongside him in Washington D.C. as a member of Congress. That's why we are fighting to help elect Jake to Congress. | Yours in the fight, Team LaTurner | "Contribute Now" | | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Kansans for LaTurner, All rights reserved.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Clear victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
The results are in -- and thanks to your support, we won our primary last night!

| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7901/27c6da69/2b3d7a73/12f1742/1891896186/VEsH/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-header-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Friend,

**The results are in -- and thanks to your support, we won our primary last night!**

First and foremost, thank you for the faith you put into this campaign. Our volunteers, staff, and supporters have been the backbone of this grassroots movement, and in just six months, we built a campaign that I am so proud of. We knocked on tens of thousands of doors, made hundreds of thousands of phone calls, and hosted more than 50 events throughout the district.

And the energy here in San Diego yesterday was amazing. We had hundreds of people all across the district knocking doors and making calls -- from Linda Vista to El Cajon, from La Mesa to Skyline to Chula Vista. Our interns went from classes to canvassing, and our incredible volunteers and supporters made calls and knocked doors all throughout the day.

What we've seen over the last six months is unmistakable: people are demanding change. They're sick of what they're seeing coming out of Washington. And they are ready for a new generation of leaders who will listen to one another, respect one another, and work across the aisle to finally get things done.

I'm proud to say we ran a positive campaign, where we spoke about our vision for the future. I'm proud that we took the high road. Politics can feel good and hopeful and be about finding solutions and improving people's lives.

This campaign is showing people here in San Diego that their voices will be heard, that they don't need to wait to make a difference, or settle for the way things have always been done on critical issues like gun violence and climate change. And we don't have to settle for the same type of politics either -- where favors are traded, games are played, and nothing gets done for people back home.

I'm so grateful to be on this journey with all of you, and I'm looking forward to working together as we head into the general election.

With gratitude,

Sara
---

* * *
| | [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7901/27c6da69/2b3d7a73/12f1743/1891896186/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-button&recurring=true&amount=25")

---

Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs is running for Congress in California's 53rd Congressional District. In Congress, she will fight for policies to address climate change, guarantee health care as a human right, end the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our schools and communities, and defend access to reproductive care. Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! _[You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7901/27c6da69/2b3d7a73/12f1744/1891896186/VEsF/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-textlink&recurring=true&amount=25")_
[](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7901/27c6da69/2b3d7a73/12f1745/1891896186/VEsC/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-gif&recurring=true&amount=25")
| [DONATE TO SARA ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7901/27c6da69/2b3d7a73/12f1743/1891896186/VEsD/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp-sjc_footer?refcode=BLU-jacobs-footer-button&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
Emails are crucial for communicating with top supporters. However, if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please _[unsubscribe.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b7901/27c6da69/2b3d7a73/12f1746/1891896186/VEsA/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://sarajacobs.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/")_

name: Brandon Zavala
subject: While I'm celebrating the win, I'm also gearing up for what's ahead. Can you make a weekly contribution of $5, or anything you can afford, so that we can start the next phase of our campaign at full speed ahead?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a69/2086788294/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | Peter,

Last night, Christy resoundingly punched her ticket to the special election run-off.

And while I'm celebrating the win, I'm also gearing up for what's ahead. We'll be going head-to-head against Mike Garcia in just 10 short weeks.

This race is getting nationwide attention, and we're going to have to work three times as hard to win our run-off in May. National Republican dark money super PACs and special interest groups are going to pour massive amounts of money into this race trying to buy back this seat.

Luckily, we have something stronger than corporate PACs and billionaires.**We have you, Peter.**

**[Can you make a weekly contribution of $5, or anything you can afford, so that we can start the next phase of our campaign at full speed ahead?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a6a/2086788294/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDRfcGl2b3RfczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200304_pivot_s3&recurring=true")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Donate $5 Weekly](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a6b/2086788294/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDRfcGl2b3RfczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200304_pivot_s3&express_lane=true&amount=5&recurring=true") | [Donate $25 Weekly](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a64/2086788294/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDRfcGl2b3RfczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200304_pivot_s3&express_lane=true&amount=25&recurring=true")

[Donate $50 Weekly](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a65/2086788294/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDRfcGl2b3RfczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200304_pivot_s3&express_lane=true&amount=50&recurring=true") | [Donate $100 Weekly](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a66/2086788294/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDRfcGl2b3RfczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200304_pivot_s3&express_lane=true&amount=100&recurring=true")
[Donate $250 Weekly](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a67/2086788294/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDRfcGl2b3RfczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200304_pivot_s3&express_lane=true&amount=250&recurring=true") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a6a/2086788294/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDRfcGl2b3RfczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200304_pivot_s3&recurring=true")
Before yesterday's election, we were running against multiple candidates. We now have to switch up our strategy as we take on a single opponent in what will be a very tough race.

We'll be knocking on more doors, making more phone calls, hosting more events, and running more ads -- but to do this to the level we need to in order to win, we need everyone to pitch in.

A weekly contribution now means you'll be with us the rest of the way -- _I'm in for $25 myself, because this race is that important._ We know that we can count on you to have Christy's back, the way she'll have your back when she's in Congress.

**[So show that you're in this until the end -- make a weekly contribution to our campaign today.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b842/29776869/ac94dde/569f9a6a/2086788294/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDRfcGl2b3RfczMifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200304_pivot_s3&recurring=true")**

Together, we've got this.

\-- Brandon

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Daily update: President Trump meets with airline CEOs to discuss Coronavirus and travel
body:
President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence sat down with airline executives at the White House this morning. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fd9148ffb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 4, 2020
---
| | |
# **Daily update: President Trump meets with airline CEOs to discuss Coronavirus and travel**

**President Trump** and Vice President Mike Pence sat down with airline executives at the White House this morning, part of the Administration’s ongoing work to address the Coronavirus and protect the health and safety of Americans.

**“Mr. President** , you said from early on that we were going to have a whole-of-government approach,” Vice President Pence said. “But the truth is, as evidenced by all these great industry leaders, it’s really a whole-of-America approach.”

🎬 [**Watch: ****Today’s ****White House Coronavirus ****B****riefing**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5384c42725&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XoHv1eD1THE&feature=emb_title")

**The risk** of contracting the Coronavirus for the average American remains low, according to experts. The Trump Administration is still taking every precaution available to keep families and communities safe.

**In addition to suspending travel** from China early on, as of yesterday, all passengers on direct flights from Italy or South Korea to America are being screened multiple times before boarding. “Everyone here should know that we’re going to continue to follow the facts and the data,” the Vice President said.

**President Trump** held a roundtable briefing yesterday afternoon with experts at the National Institutes of Health (NIH) in Maryland. “I know you’re working around the clock. I know you’ve made some great finds already,” he said. “Fantastic job.”

[President meets with airline CEOs to discuss Coronavirus impact](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=848b8395a6&e=3ee4985eea)

**LEARN MORE:** [Follow CDC’s prevention & preparedness recommendations!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc05f1bb36&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: President Trump addresses Latino Coalition leaders**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ee4732c71&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **“Under the booming** Trump Economy, Latinos are achieving record gains,” President Trump said today at the Latino Coalition Legislative Summit in Washington, D.C.

**The stats** speak for themselves:
* The unemployment rate for Hispanic Americans hit an all-time low in 2019

* The poverty rate for Hispanic Americans is now at a record low

* Since the election, America has created more jobs for Hispanic Americans (3 million) than the experts predicted would be created _in total_(2 million)

[In case you missed it: Trump Economy benefits historically disadvantaged Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac7b412864&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Marine One, with President Trump aboard, prepares to land at National Harbor** | February 29, 2020
---
|

Peter,

Bernie Sanders won several key states on Super Tuesday....

**This means that Democrats across the country are choosing socialism over freedom in 2020!**

There is a fight for the soul of the Democrat Party and socialists, led by Bernie Sanders and AOC, are dictating the terms.

A man who has:
* _Defended Fidel Castro’s socialist regime_

But, make no mistake the real winner here is _**SOCIALISM**_.

Bernie Sanders has successfully pushed socialism into the mainstream. An ideology, so perverse that it has been successful only at one thing over the last century; causing as much human suffering and destruction of individual freedom as possible!

name: Hillary Holley
subject: ALERT: Georgia's anti-voting rights bill is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
We need your help to stop the anti-voting rights bill of 2020. SB 463 is a suppressive bill that the State Elections Board is forcing onto Georgia's legislature to cover up their own repeated failures |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5d3/34a064cc/1b457ca9/702bc35/2091383520/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - **The anti-voting rights bill of 2020 is here, and we need your help to stop it.** Yesterday, the Senate Ethics Committee rushed SB 463 out of committee on a party-line vote, and it will be on the floor of the Senate for a vote as early as the beginning of next week. **SB 463 is a suppressive bill that the State Elections Board is forcing onto Georgia 's legislature to cover up their own repeated failures.** Here's just a sample of what SB 463 could do if it is passed into law:
* Make it far more likely that absentee ballots will be rejected if they do not include a copy of a voter's ID. It would take a voter having access to a printer to ensure their absentee ballot is counted.
* After years of failing Georgia voters, the Secretary of State uses SB 463 to declare that it's not his job or the job of the State Elections Board to ensure Georgia's compliance with federal voting laws. This will open up Georgia's counties to litigation that comes with great costs.
* In 2018, Georgians faced the longest voting lines in the country. Now, the State Elections Board is seeking to slash the required number of voting machines across the state.
* In addition to cutting voting machine requirements, SB 463 will also mandate "precinct splitting" in precincts with reported long lines, creating confusion for voters and additional unfunded mandates for the counties.

**Help us fight back against SB 463 and protect voting rights in Georgia!** **Here 's what you can do right now.** Call or email these key State Senators and tell them to vote NO on SB 463 and to force the State Elections Board to do its job: **State Senator P.K. Martin**
404-463-6598
p.k.martin@senate.ga.gov **State Senator John Albers**
404-463-8055
John.albers @senate.ga.gov **State Senator Brian Strickland**
404-656-7454
brian.strickland@senate.ga.gov **State Senator Kay Kirkpatrick**
404-656-3932
kay.kirkpatrick@@senate.ga.gov **State Senator Lindsey Tippins**
404-657-0406
lindsey.tippins@senate.ga.gov **State Senator Renee Unterman**
404-463-1368
renee.unterman@senate.ga.gov Additionally, make sure to keep up with Fair Fight Action on social media to stay up to date on the latest calls to action around SB 463. Thank you for all you do,
Hillary and Team Organizing
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5d3/34a064cc/1b457ca9/702bc32/2091383520/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5d3/34a064cc/1b457ca9/702bc33/2091383520/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5d3/34a064cc/1b457ca9/702bc30/2091383520/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

body:
I'm blown away by the results of the primary yesterday.
|
---
| | Derek --

I wanted to follow up on my note from Monday night because I'm blown away by the results of the primary yesterday.

**1,324,325 Virginians voted in the Democratic Presidential Primary yesterday.** That's nearly DOUBLE the votes cast in the 2016 primary. When you folks say you're ready to put in the work to keep the Blue Wave going in the Commonwealth, you aren't kidding.

This record participation proves Virginians are focused on building on the electoral gains of the last few years. But make no mistake: if we don't continue to grow that incredible enthusiasm we could find ourselves short of our goal of winning up and down the ballot here in Virginia. You have my commitment that I will be working every day to protect and expand on the progress we've made in the Commonwealth.

We need to keep building on this momentum through November. **And that work starts here, with us.** It's time to start making sure our friends and neighbors are **[registered to vote](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5da/53d9897e/53008e98/1c89886a/570980930/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")**. It's time to think about ways to support the candidates and causes we care about -- whether that's through time spent phone or text banking, knocking doors, or making a donation to help flip the Senate in 2020.

Let's get out there and build on this incredible energy!

Thank you for your support.

-- Mark Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5da/53d9897e/53008e98/1c898869/570980930/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200304_e_1_fl__499__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
